contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Fastest route: the RFQ form asks the questions we would ask anyway.
contact.features: Email and RFQ routing for Tucsenberg buyers

inquiryHandoff.title: Fastest route
inquiryHandoff.description: The RFQ form asks the questions we would ask anyway, so your quote comes back faster.

need.title: What you are protecting
need.description: Door, garage, driveway, loading dock, perimeter, stock or resale order, or other.

context.title: Dimensions
context.description: Opening width x height or run length, mounting surface or ground type, plus photos or drawings if available.

timing.title: Market and port
timing.description: Quantity, market, delivery port and timeline help us quote standard items within 12 hours and custom configurations within 48.

panel.emailUnavailable: Use the RFQ form if email is unavailable.
panel.prepareValue: Use the RFQ form; it asks the questions we'd ask anyway.

form.title: Send an enquiry
form.description: For the fastest quote, use Request a Quote. This form still reaches Tucsenberg.
form.subject: Subject
form.subjectPlaceholder: Product line, quantity, or site question
form.messagePlaceholder: Share product interest, quantity, market, delivery port, timeline, dimensions, or photos/drawings you can provide.
form.privacyNotice: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
form.submitSuccess: Received. You'll hear from a person, not a sequence.
form.submitError: We couldn't send your message. Please try again shortly.
form.networkError: We could not submit the form. Please try again.
form.turnstilePending: Security verification is loading. You can send the form once it is ready.
form.turnstileFailed: Security verification did not complete. Please try again.
form.turnstileExpired: Security verification expired. Please complete it again.
form.success: Received. Standard items: quote within 12 hours. Custom: within 48. You'll hear from a person, not a sequence.
form.error: Sorry, there was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
form.loadError: The secure inquiry form could not load. Retry, or use the contact methods on this page.
form.rateLimitMessage: You've recently contacted us. Please wait a moment before sending another message.

errors.generic: Please review the highlighted fields and try again.

fullName.tooLong: Full name must be less than 50 characters

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
email.tooLong: Email must be less than 100 characters

company.tooShort: Company name must be at least 2 characters
company.tooLong: Company name must be less than 100 characters

productInquiryKind.required: Please choose an inquiry type before sending
productInquiryKind.invalid: The inquiry type is not recognized

catalogProductId.required: Please choose a product before sending your inquiry
catalogProductId.invalid: The selected product is not recognized

quantity.invalid: Quantity must be a valid amount

requirements.tooLong: Requirements must be less than 1000 characters

message.tooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters
message.tooLong: Message must be less than 1000 characters

phone.invalid: Please enter a valid phone number

subject.length: Subject must be between 5 and 100 characters

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters

metadata.title: Request a Quote — 12-Hour Response on Standard Items
metadata.description: Send dimensions, quantities, market and timeline. Standard flood barrier items quoted within 12 hours; custom configurations within 48.

page.heading: Get real numbers, fast
page.intro: Two required fields, one optional message — send what you know and a person replies. Standard items quoted within {standardHours} hours, custom configurations within {customHours}.
page.confidencePricing: No published-price games — the quote is the price conversation

form.title: Request a quote
form.success: Received. Standard items: quote within 12 hours. Custom: within 48. You'll hear from a person, not a sequence.
form.genericError: We could not send your RFQ. Please review the fields.
form.networkError: Network error. Please try again or email sales@tucsenberg.com.
form.turnstilePending: Security verification is still loading. Please try again.
form.messageHint: Optional, but anything helps: product line, opening sizes (width × height), quantity, delivery country or port. The more you tell us, the more accurate the first quote — and you can always just say hello and ask.
form.privacyNotice: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
form.successReading: While you wait, this is how we match products to sites:
form.successReadingLinkLabel: ABS vs Aluminum vs FRP vs Water-Filled — How to Choose
